_example_purpose: Class 2 scanning session that accepted the first option (yes on option 0). Illustrates the four scanning-related optional clarification_interaction fields populated together: input_mode='scanning', scan_history with one yes turn, scan_ordering_applied attributing the deterministic-ranking rule that produced the order, candidate_source recording where the candidate set came from. Plan refs: doc 12 §4.4 (interaction model), §4.6 (deterministic ordering), 04_class2_clarification.md.
notes: input_mode='scanning' means each candidate was announced as a separate {n}/{N}. <prompt> utterance and the user answered yes/no per turn. The user answered yes on option 0 in 1500ms, ending the session immediately.

scan_ordering_applied attributes the order to the C206 bucket of policy_table.global_constraints.class2_scan_ordering_rules. No context_overrides matched (smoke/gas/doorbell all false in this example).
transition_target='CLASS_1' is confirmed-candidate evidence; the runtime re-enters the Deterministic Validator with the bounded candidate before any low-risk dispatch.
